title: Day 13: AI Design & Media — Professional Visuals Without a Designer

steps.title: You Are Now a Design Agency
steps.body:
Professional design used to require: a creative director ($$$), a graphic designer ($$), a video editor ($$), and a copywriter ($).

With AI tools like Midjourney, DALL-E, Canva AI, and AI video generators — you are all of them.

Today you'll learn:
• Image prompt engineering: subject + style + mood + composition
• Brand-consistent visual generation
• AI video creation
• Design-to-code with AI

By the end, you'll produce assets that look like they came from a professional studio.

The AI image prompt formula:

[Subject] + [Action/Setting] + [Style] + [Mood] + [Composition] + [Technical specs]

Example: 'A sleek dashboard interface on a laptop | modern tech office with plants | flat illustration style, warm teal color scheme | clean and productive mood | wide angle, soft lighting | 4K, high detail'

Style keywords: photorealistic, 3D render, flat illustration, watercolor, vector art, cinematic, retro, minimalist, abstract, pixel art
highlights: Subject + Action/Setting + Style + Mood + Composition + Technical specs

steps.question: For creating consistent brand visuals with AI, which practice is most important?
options: Using a completely different prompt each time for variety
Creating a reusable prompt template with consistent subject, style, and mood keywords
Always using the highest resolution setting
Letting AI choose the style automatically
feedback: Exactly. Brand consistency comes from reusable prompt components — fix the style and mood keywords, vary only the subject. This creates a recognizable look.
Not quite. Consistency comes from templating your prompts. Lock in style, mood, and composition keywords. Only change the subject.

steps.title: From Blank Page to Complete Brand Kit
steps.prompt:
Using Canva AI + Midjourney + AI video tools:

Step 1 — Logo Variations:
'Generate 10 logo concepts for [brand name], a modern AI consulting firm. Minimalist style, deep blue and gold color palette, technology and human elements combined.'

Step 2 — Brand Color Palette:
'From these logos, extract a 5-color brand palette with hex codes. Then generate 3 gradient backgrounds using these colors.'

Step 3 — Social Media Templates:
'Create 5 Instagram post templates for the brand: one quote post, one tip post, one before/after, one announcement, one testimonial. Consistent styling.'

Step 4 — Product Images:
'Generate 4 product images showing a dashboard interface in different business settings — office, coffee shop, home office, meeting room.'

Step 5 — Video Ad:
'Create a 15-second promotional video script and storyboard for [brand]. Then use AI video tools to generate the initial cut.'

Step 6 — Design-to-Code:
'Take the landing page design and write HTML/CSS that implements it exactly. Responsive, optimized, ready to deploy.'

Output: A complete brand kit — from concept to code — in an afternoon.

steps.title: Design Your Brand Prompt Library
steps.instruction:
Create reusable prompt templates for consistent AI-generated visuals:

Brand/Project: [What are you creating visuals for?]

Image Prompt Template (fill in the blank):
'[Subject], [setting], [style], [color palette], [mood], [composition], 4K, high detail'

Style Keywords (lock these for consistency):
• Style:
• Color Palette:
• Mood:
• Composition:

3 Visual Assets You Need (describe each):
1. [Asset] — [Prompt variation]
2. [Asset] — [Prompt variation]
3. [Asset] — [Prompt variation]
steps.placeholder:
Brand/Project: Turbo Learning — AI Education Platform

Image Template: '[Subject], in a modern workspace with warm lighting, flat illustration style, dark navy and teal color palette, focused and productive mood, medium shot, soft shadows, 4K'

Style Keywords:
• Style: Flat illustration with subtle gradients
• Colors: Dark navy (#0f172a), Teal (#14b8a6), Warm gray (#f8f9fa)
• Mood: Professional, focused, approachable
• Composition: Medium shots with clean backgrounds

3 Visual Assets:
1. Hero image — 'A person with holographic AI interface floating above laptop, warm lighting, flat illustration style, dark navy/teal, productive mood, medium shot'
2. Feature illustration — 'Dashboard showing progress chart, tablet on desk, flat illustration style, teal accents, clean composition'
3. Social card — 'Open notebook with AI-generated text floating above, minimalist composition, navy background, teal accents'

questions.prompt: What visual assets would make the biggest difference for your current project or business? What would it be worth to have a professional-looking brand kit?
questions.placeholder: The assets you need and the value they'd create...

steps.title: Day 13 Complete!
steps.body:
You can now generate professional visual assets with AI — from logos to social media templates to video scripts. The prompt formula (subject + style + mood + composition) gives you consistent, usable results.

Tomorrow: The Week 2 capstone. You combine everything into one substantial project worth $100-500.
